use_cases: Form checkbox inputs for user preferences and settings
Terms and conditions acceptance in registration flows
Feature toggle controls in settings panels
Multi-select list items in admin dashboards
Agreement and consent checkboxes in checkout processes
ai_summary: A premium dark-themed checkbox component with smooth spring animations for the checkmark reveal and subtle scale effects on hover and tap. Features a glow effect when checked and uses framer-motion for polished micro-interactions. Designed as a reusable form input component suitable for modern SaaS, fintech, and developer tools interfaces requiring elegant checkbox functionality.
